selection_source.rule: Continue with unrefreshed full-2024 PASS rows after Waves 2-4. Exclude candidates already falsified on the same symbol in a later full-history test, candidates already represented in the incumbent, and half-year-only rows.

ordered_candidates.note: The separate NDX full-history port failed previously; GDAXI remains an unrefreshed symbol-specific hypothesis.
Prior validation attempts were infrastructure-invalid NO_HISTORY runs, not a strategy verdict.
Old sprint ranking rejected the sleeve for speed, but no current-framework full-history cost reconstruction exists.

portfolio_contract.development_survivor_rule: A fixed candidate representation and weight must improve both threshold and adverse preholdout pass rates.
portfolio_contract.sealed_holdout_open_rule: Open once only for a frozen development survivor.
